message:
refactor(cli): make graph table formatting testable

Refactor the metric and cycle table printing functions to improve
testability and reduce code duplication:

1. Extract format_metric_table() and format_cycles_table() functions
   that return Option<String> instead of printing directly. These
   pure functions can be unit tested without capturing stdout.

2. Create thin print_metric_table() and print_cycles_table() wrappers
   that call the format functions and print the result.

3. Remove duplicate table printing code in run_top() by calling the
   shared print_metric_table() function.

4. Add unit tests verifying:
   - Metric table rendering with mixed input formats (object and array)
   - Cycle table rendering with skill name lookup
   - Empty input handling (returns None instead of printing nothing)

This refactoring makes the graph command output deterministic and
testable without changing any visible behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
